name: Flicker
effect: Teleport a short distance in a designated direction. Gains 5 (+1 per level) Physical and Magic Defense for 1s after teleporting.

name: Retribution
effect: Deals 480-1260 True Damage to the targeted jungle monster or minion. Grants Jungling equipment effects.

name: Execute
effect: Deals 200-520 (+25% lost HP) True Damage to target enemy hero. Damage scales with enemy missing HP.

name: Inspire
effect: Gain 55% Attack Speed for 5s. Basic Attacks ignore 8 Physical Defense of the target during the duration.

name: Sprint
effect: Increases Movement Speed by 42% for 6s. Slowly decays over the duration. Immune to slow effects for 2s.

name: Flameshot
effect: Fires a flaming shot in designated direction, dealing 160-640 Magic Damage and knocking enemies back. Damage increases with distance.

name: Aegis
effect: Generates a shield that absorbs 750-1500 damage for 3s. Nearby allies receive 50% of the shield.

name: Petrify
effect: Deals 100-250 Magic Damage to surrounding enemies and petrifies them for 0.8s.

name: Purify
effect: Immediately removes all negative effects and gains Control Immunity and 15% Movement Speed for 1.2s.

name: Revitalize
effect: Creates a Healing Spring around you for 4s. Allies in the area continuously recover HP (total 400-800 HP) and gain 25% increased healing.

name: Vengeance
effect: Gain 25% Damage Reduction for 3s. Deals 40-120 + 20% Magic Damage back to attackers.

name: Arrival
effect: Channels for 3s then teleports to allied turret or minion. Gains 60% extra Movement Speed for 3s upon arrival. Can be interrupted.
